idea-plugin.name: Nacos Search
idea-plugin.description:
Nacos Search plugin for IntelliJ IDEA that allows developers to query Nacos configurations directly from within the IDE

Features:

  • Connect to Nacos server via Open API
  • Local caching of configuration data
  • Namespace and group filtering
  • Seamless IntelliJ IDEA integration
idea-plugin.change-notes:
1.3.1
  • Fix: HTTP connections in requestPost are now always disconnected via try/finally, eliminating socket leaks on error and exception paths.
  • Fix: login credentials are URL-encoded so usernames/passwords containing &, =, + no longer corrupt the login form.
  • Fix: PaginationPanel now disposes its namespace listener via the Disposable tree, preventing Swing leaks across project open/close.
  • Fix: NacosConfigKeyReferenceSearcher honors the Find Usages consumer cancel signal instead of always materializing the full reference list.
  • Fix: minified (single-line) JSON configurations are now parsed for gutter markers, go-to-declaration and Find Usages; the parser silently returned an empty map before.
  • Fix: performSearch cancels any pending debounced search so a late debounce coroutine can no longer overwrite a fresh page/immediate result.
  • Fix: stale tokens for switched server/user combinations are evicted from the auth cache instead of lingering for the app lifetime.
  • Fix: NacosSearchPlugin now implements Disposable so its coroutine scope is actually reclaimed on shutdown.
  • Perf: cache reads are lock-free and no longer run a full expiry sweep on every search; expiry reclamation moved to the background/writer path.
  • Perf: cache entry payloads moved from a single multi-hundred-MB state XML to per-entry files, fixing orphan blobs and slow startup.
  • Perf: cache loading runs in the background so IDE startup is no longer blocked on cache file I/O; single-key reads resolve from file without waiting for the full load.
  • Perf: getAllConfigurations fetches per-item content concurrently (bounded at 8) instead of sequentially.
  • UI: the save button label now reads "Save" instead of "Save & Publish".
  • i18n: fixed untranslated placeholder keys (error.unknown, namespace.failed.select), a typo in config.list.dirty, and unified the Chinese bundle encoding to native UTF-8.
1.3.0
  • Fix: phantom gutter icon no longer appears when a @NacosPropertySource dataId does not exist in the loaded Nacos namespace. The unresolved marker is now only shown when the dataId is known to the cache (or the cache is cold).
  • Fix: resolved NacosConfigKeyElement now carries the source PSI element so "Find Usages" and navigation keep working after lazy-load.
  • UI: redesigned search bar, clear button, group filter pill and tool-window toolbar with a consistent lightweight toolbar-button style.
  • Perf: debounced search input and background namespace-index preheat so the first content/wildcard search is instant.
1.2.0
  • Added @NacosValue gutter icon with dual-state (resolved/unresolved) and PSI reference navigation.
